claim_a: Employees are permitted to work remotely up to 2 days a week.
claim_b: employees can work remotely 5 days a week.

claim_a: All travel expenses must be submitted within 30 days of the trip.
claim_b: Travel expenses must be submitted within 15 days of the trip

claim_a: Employees receive 15 days of PTO per year.
claim_b: Employees now receive 20 days of PTO per year.

claim_a: We have chosen MongoDB as our primary database for user profiles.
claim_b: PostgreSQL is now the primary database for user profiles.

claim_a: Authentication is handled via JWT tokens with a 24-hour expiration.
claim_b: The expiration time is strictly set to 1 hour for security.

claim_a: All microservices communicate via REST over HTTP/1.1.
claim_b: Services communicate asynchronously via Kafka events.

claim_a: Our deployment strategy uses blue-green deployments on AWS ECS.
claim_b: Deployments are handled by Kubernetes on AWS EKS.

claim_a: All PII must be encrypted at rest using AES-256.
claim_b: PII data is encrypted at rest using ChaCha20.

claim_a: Passwords must be at least 12 characters
claim_b: User passwords require a minimum of 16 characters.

claim_a: Every PR requires approval from at least two senior engineers.
claim_b: PRs must be approved by one engineer

claim_a: Core working hours are 10 AM to 3 PM EST.
claim_b: We maintain core working hours of 10 AM to 3 PM EST

claim_a: The caching layer is implemented using Redis.
claim_b: The caching layer remains on Redis
Admin access requires hardware security keys (YubiKey) for MFA.

claim_a: Authentication is handled via JWT tokens with a 24-hour expiration.
